description: Full TCP SYN scan across all 65535 ports on a subnet. Good first pass for host/port discovery.
Service/version detection plus default NSE scripts on common ports. Good for quick triage.
Scan the top 20 most common UDP ports. UDP scans are slow, so start narrow.
Display filter for TLS Client Hello packets on port 443, useful for spotting SNI/domain fronting.
Display filter to catch plaintext credentials being POSTed over unencrypted HTTP.
Capture DNS traffic on eth0 to a pcap file for later analysis in Wireshark.
example: tcpdump -i eth0 -w dns-capture.pcap port 53 and host 8.8.8.8

description: Live ASCII view of unencrypted HTTP traffic on any interface, no DNS resolution.
Generate a SHA-256 hash of a disk image to establish chain-of-custody integrity before analysis.
